Video.summary: Salish and her friend Everleigh transform into twins and attempt five one color challenges.
Video.title: New Twin Sister

Video.summary: Instagram controls Salish and Nidal in Magic Mountain with a shocking prank at the end!
Video.title: 24 Hour Park Challenge

Video.summary: Kade and his friend Nayeli become adults and try to be parents for 24 hours.
Video.title: Parents For 24 Hours

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz challenge Dark Howl, pooling their strength together for an epic showdown.
Video.title: Ninja Power United

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz test ninja skills in a talent showdown and challenge a sumo wrestler.
Video.title: Best Ninja Skills

Video.summary: Salish surprises her best friend with a 24 hour waterpark truth or dare challenge!
Video.title: Emotional Waterpark Challenge

Video.summary: Hudson and ZHC surprise Salish with an epic back-to-school room makeover!
Video.title: Back To School Room Makeover

Video.summary: The Fun Squad confronts their biggest fears: fire-walking, Eiffel Tower scaling, and insane thrill rides.
Video.title: Facing Fears In Paris

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz sneak into fans' homes and surprise them with awesome merch without getting caught.
Video.title: We Broke into Fans Houses

Video.summary: Ninja Dad planned the strictest driving test for twins Payton and Paxton. Can they make it?
Video.title: World's Strictest Driving Test

Video.summary: Nidal and Salish run away to Vegas and go on a spooky night adventure to Knotts Scary Farm.
Video.title: Ultimate Escape

Video.summary: Payton and Paxton compete in a strength challenge before playing hide and seek in the dark.
Video.title: Twin Strike Challenge

Video.summary: Rebecca races against time as her daughter ages with every minute.
Video.title: Every Hour My Daughter Gets 1 Year Older

Image.alt: Every Hour My Daughter Gets 1 Year Older
Every Hour My Daughter Gets 1 Year Older
Every Hour My Daughter Gets 1 Year Older

Video.summary: The Fun Squad and friends celebrate every holiday to determine which is the ultimate best!
Video.title: Surviving Every Holiday

Video.summary: The Fun Squad catch the Elf On The Shelf on hidden camera.
Video.title: Elf On The Shelf Caught On Hidden Cameras!

Image.alt: Elf On The Shelf Caught On Hidden Cameras!
Elf On The Shelf Caught On Hidden Cameras!
Elf On The Shelf Caught On Hidden Cameras!

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz search for the most talented ninja and attempt a trampoline challenge.
Video.title: Extreme Trampoline Challenge

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz take over WWE Wrestlemania 40.
Video.title: Wrestlemania Takeover

Video.summary: There are 5 real couples and one fake— if Salish guesses right, she wins $1,000!
Video.title: Guess The Fake Couple

Video.summary: Salish goes on a date with Nidal while Jordan panics— is she too young to date?
Video.title: Emotional First Date

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz are training to face off with Rita and the Green Ranger, who wield the powerful Dark Sword.
Video.title: Ranger Return

Video.summary: Dr. Disaster turns Bryton, Ashton, and Payton into toys, and the only ninja left to help is Paxton.
Video.title: Dojo Rescue

Video.summary: The Fun Squad try to survive Halloween's scariest movies.
Video.title: Surviving Halloween!

Video.summary: Kyler is left Home Alone and must protect the house, and the families Christmas decorations from the Grinch!
Video.title: Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!

Image.alt: Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!
Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!
Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!

Video.summary: Kade blind dates 6 girls based only on their outfit.
Video.title: Dress to Impress Challenge

Video.summary: Jazzy and Shae got married and had kids for 24 hours.
Video.title: Shazzy IRL Full Movie

Video.summary: Jazzy Skye and Shae Bennett spill all the tea, sharing awkward secrets, crushes, and hilarious moments.
Video.title: We Broke Up! Exposing Secrets

Video.summary: The Fun Squad, Santa, and the Grinch swap morning routines for a hilarious 24-hour challenge.
Video.title: Santa and Grinch Swap

Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt search for a new home for their growing family with only 24 hours to find it.
Video.title: Finding a New House in 24 Hours

Finding a New House in 24 Hours
Finding a New House in 24 Hours

Video.summary: Girls’ sleepover tournament last one standing wins a huge Target spree.
Video.title: Ages 1-18 Sleepover Challenge

Video.summary: Friends compete in a one-color dress challenge to win a new iPhone.
Video.title: One Color Dress Challenge

Video.summary: Rebecca and students expose the worst teachers in her city.
Video.title: Exposing the Worst Rated Teachers

Video.summary: Who stole the baby’s gender reveal? Rebecca investigates!
Video.title: Gymnast Stole Reveal?

Video.summary: A giant dress-to-impress game of Clue challenges Rebecca to survive.
Video.title: Giant Dress to Impress Clue Game

Video.summary: Zadie’s birthday party goes off-plan during Rebecca’s surprise celebration.
Video.title: Daughter's Birthday Surprise!

Video.summary: Rebecca Zamolo competes as every win ages a cheerleader from 1 to 50 with crazy results.
Video.title: Win, Cheerleader Ages

Video.summary: Salish says an emotional goodbye to her gymnastics team as she moves 3,000 miles away.
Video.title: Salish Emotional Goodbye To Gymnastics

Video.summary: Salish transforms her room into a beach while her mom and dad are out shopping.
Video.title: I Turned My House Into a Beach

Video.summary: Salish tries to build a secret room in school without getting caught.

Video.summary: Who is sabotaging HOCO? Could it be Salish?
Video.title: Who Sabotaged the School Dance?

Video.summary: Salish tours 5 homes and challenges the Anazala Family to guess which one is hers!
Video.title: Emotional New Home Reveal

Video.summary: Bryton, Ashton and Paxton try to build an igloo and survive for 50 hours.
Video.title: I Survived in a Snow Fort

Video.summary: Payton celebrates the holidays by singing "Christmas Rewind" and enjoying a family game of Among Us.
Video.title: A Payton Holiday
